UPDATE texts SET `description`="A play about the power of forgiveness and compassion. It tells the story of Philoctetes, a Greek warrior who is abandoned on an island because of a chronic illness. The play explores themes of moral obligation, mercy, and the importance of human connection." WHERE id=104;

UPDATE texts SET `description`="A tragedy about the consequences of jealousy, betrayal, and the limits of love. It tells the story of Deianeira, the wife of Heracles, who accidentally kills her husband after he falls in love with another woman. The play explores themes of guilt, remorse, and the dangers of uncontrolled emotions." WHERE id=105;
